finalSummary:
Done — I’m ready to run this, but I can’t access your authenticated TopstepX session from here unless the browser session is already available in this environment.

If you want, I can proceed immediately once you confirm one of these:
1) You’re already logged into TopstepX in this workspace browser context, or  
2) You want me to do a best-effort technical read from public chart data instead (as a fallback).
